Infrastructure for
real-time agents
Telnyx owns the full stack from carrier network to AI inference, so there's nothing between your agent and the person on the other end. No handoffs. No lag. Just voice, messaging, and AI that keeps up.
EXPLORE THE STACK
TALK TO AN EXPERT
14,000+ INDUSTRY-LEADING COMPANIES choose telnyx
THE FULL STACK
Yesterday, infrastructure was provisioned via portals and tickets. Today, it's triggered by APIs. Tomorrow, it is autonomous.
Agent Control Plane and Runtime
Layers 6–9
Agent Execution & Memory
Intelligence lives inside the call. We bridge the gap by colocating GPUs with the live communications path.
Layers 4–5
Programmatic Identity & Compliance
Voice follows the user. We unified mobile and fixed identity layers under a single programmable control plane.
Layers 1–3
Owned Network
You cannot optimize what you do not own. Telnyx replaced the public internet with a bare-metal global communications fabric.
THE FULL STACK
Yesterday, infrastructure was provisioned via portals and tickets. Today, it’s triggered by APIs. Tomorrow, it is autonomous.

Ready to build?
CONFIGURE AGENT
Layers 1–3
Layers 4–5

Owned Network

Physical network and interconnect
Bare-metal fiber and direct peering across global regions for agent-controlled, deterministic routing.
Next
AGENT RUNTIME
Configure the environment your agents run in
Choose the models, voice, and infrastructure your agents will operate on. Once live, agents control the system directly, speaking, routing, and acting without human intervention.
Inference
Voice Agent Builder
Speech to Text

Agent Skills

MiniMax M2.7
Kimi

Qwen3 235B A22B
GLM

CHAT TO AN AGENT
United States

SEND MESSAGE
COMPETITION
Not retrofitted for agents. Built for them.
On most platforms, agents sit on top of UI-first products, constrained by rented infrastructure and manual approval paths. Telnyx is different. We’re the only agent-native platform that owns the primitives, not abstracting over someone else’s foundations.
FEATURE
Owns and controls the telephony stack for native calling.
Available
Not available
Not available
Not available
Co-located edge PoPs and GPUs to power low-latency Voice AI globally.
Available

SOLUTIONS
Transform workflows across your business.
Accelerate response times, lower costs, and improve accuracy with AI-driven voice automation.
EXPLORE OUR AI ASSISTANT
Healthcare
Reduce appointment no-shows with real-time reminders
Confirm, reschedule, or cancel appointments automatically, keeping calendars full and staff free from follow-ups.
LEARN MORE
about healthcare solutions
Reduce appointment no-shows with real-time reminders
Confirm, reschedule, or cancel appointments automatically, keeping calendars full and staff free from follow-ups.
Finance
Secure, compliant, and built for financial scale
Resolve customer queries, verifications, and alerts instantly with Voice AI agents.
LEARN MORE
about finance solutions
Automotive
Modernize automotive sales, service, and repairs
Drive real-time, secure customer experiences across the automotive ecosystem, powered by our private global network.
LEARN MORE
about automotive solutions
Retail and e-commerce
Simplify returns with always-on assistance
Let customers initiate returns, track orders, and get refunds via AI agents that solve problems on the first interaction.
LEARN MORE
about retail and eCommerce solutions
Travel and Hospitality
Drive more bookings, 24/7/365
Let travelers check availability, get answers, and book instantly with AI agents, no wait times and no missed opportunities.
LEARN MORE
about travel and hospitality solutions
SECURITY
Enterprise security, baked into the SIM
In the age of deepfakes and spoofing, the network is your only source of truth. Because Telnyx owns the Mobile Core, we verify identity at the network level, ensuring your AI agents know exactly who is speaking, every time.
Where milliseconds matter, Telnyx delivers
From first call to global deployment, Telnyx gives you the stack, scale, and support to launch real-time conversational AI with confidence.
START BUILDING
CONTACT US
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES
40+
Languages supported with real-time, multilingual AI transcription.
MILLISECONDS
<500
End-to-end latency powered by Telnyx’s telecom edge PoPs and colocated GPUs.
COUNTRIES
30+
Supported with a licensed carrier footprint, compliance trusted worldwide.

Flexible, transparent pricing with discounts as you scale.
Pay as you go

Introduction
Copy page
Telnyx product guides and tutorials — AI voice assistants, global SMS/MMS, voice APIs, phone numbers, IoT SIM, and programmable networking, all in one place.
Copy page

https://developers.telnyx.com/llms.txt
Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
​
What you’ll find here
Account setup
Complete guide to setting up and managing your Telnyx account, from initial
signup to account verification and upgrades.
AI
Incorporate AI into your applications with ease.
Real-time communications
Build powerful communication experiences with voice, messaging, video, and
fax capabilities.
IoT and networking
Connect devices globally with IoT SIM cards and build private networks with
enterprise-grade connectivity solutions.
Cloud storage
Telnyx Cloud Storage is S3-compatible distributed storage with low cost, low
latency, and easy migration from AWS S3.
Reporting
Access usage reports and debugging tools for your Telnyx account.
​

Integrate with Voice AI Agents
Automate and accelerate your workflows with seamless integrations.
Browser Integrations
Your tools. Your workflows. Now powered by Voice AI.
Telnyx Voice AI Agents enable businesses to automate and scale voice interactions using advanced speech recognition, natural language understanding, and real-time decisioning.
By integrating the power of natural voice with CRMs, ITSM tools, and collaboration platforms, teams can optimize workflows, reduce manual effort, and transform everyday workflows into faster resolutions and simpler experiences.

hits.title: Telnyx Python SDK: Supply Chain Security Notice
Catching the LiteLLM and Telnyx supply chain zero-days via semantic analysis
The telnyx packages on PyPI have been compromised
Team PCP Strikes again – `telnyx` on PyPI gets compromised
FCC Proposes $4M+ Fine Against Telnyx for Apparently Illegal Robocall Scheme

analysis.name: Telnyx
analysis.value_proposition: Telnyx owns the full stack from carrier network to AI inference, enabling businesses to build low-latency voice AI agents without third-party handoffs or rented infrastructure.
analysis.ideal_customer: Businesses building voice AI agents, contact centers, and real-time communications applications that need owned-infrastructure reliability and global scale

features.description: Fully autonomous voice agents that handle calls, route, and act without human intervention
features.evidence_quote: agents control the system directly, speaking, routing, and acting without human intervention

features.name: node-red integration

features.evidence_quote: Node-RED

differentiators: Owns the full telephony stack end-to-end — not abstracting over someone else's infrastructure
Co-located GPUs with live communications path for minimal AI inference latency
Operates a private global bare-metal network, bypassing the public internet
SIM-level identity verification to counter deepfakes and spoofing
Built-in programmatic compliance (10DLC/KYC) enforced before agent execution
Agent-native platform — not retrofitted from a UI-first product
Unified mobile and fixed identity layers under a single programmable control plane

complaints: PyPI package compromised in a supply chain attack — multiple HN threads and security advisories
FCC proposed $4M+ fine against Telnyx for allegedly illegal robocall scheme
"Telnyx Knows Nothing" — HN thread suggesting poor support or knowledge gaps (low signal, 12 upvotes)

tiers.name: Pay As You Go
tiers.headline_inclusions: Usage-based billing; free 24/7 support; portal access; automatic volume discounts

tiers.name: Volume-Based
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom discounted pricing based on monthly usage; dedicated CSM; prioritized NOC support

pricing.notes: Pure usage-based pricing — no published seat tiers or flat monthly fees. All products (Voice, SMS, AI, Numbers, IoT, Storage, etc.) are priced per-unit with automatic discounts at higher volumes. Volume-based tier requires sales engagement. No free trial or free tier mentioned.
